zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短期横盘震荡，潜在上行趋势
zh.content:
当前比特币价格位于77005美元附近，较24小时高点77397美元略低，显示短期内多空力量较为平衡。价格接近20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)76735美元，暗示短期支撑稳固，若突破SMA20下方可能触发短线回调。

MACD指标显示主线132.50位于信号线之上，但信号线未明确，表明上行动能存在但强度有限。缺失RSI数据限制了超买/超卖判断，但结合价格和均线位置，可推测市场仍保持轻微多头倾向。

支撑位方面，76850美元的近期低点和SMA20构成短线支撑，突破该区域可能引发更深调整。阻力位在77397美元高点及77500美元心理关口，如价格稳住并有效突破，将确认短期上行趋势延续。

交易策略上，建议短线投资者关注支撑位附近的低吸机会，严格控制止损在76800美元下方。中线投资者可等待价格突破77400美元确认上行动能后再择机加仓，保持仓位灵活以应对横盘震荡风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently consolidating around 77000 after a mild 24-hour range, showing a balanced but slightly bullish structure. Price action is holding just above the 20-period SMA at 76735, suggesting buyers are still defending short-term trend support. However, upside momentum remains limited as repeated tests of the 77397 intraday high have failed to produce a breakout, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers.

Momentum indicators suggest a cautiously constructive bias despite the absence of a clearly defined RSI reading. The MACD remains positive at 132.50, implying that short-term momentum is still tilted upward, although the lack of a visible signal line reading limits confirmation strength. Price behavior near the upper boundary of the recent range suggests waning acceleration rather than aggressive expansion, typical of late-stage consolidation phases.

Key support and resistance levels are well-defined within a tight intraday band. Immediate support is anchored at the 20-SMA near 76735, followed closely by the session low at 76850, which reinforces a short-term floor. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 77397, and a sustained break above this level could open a path toward the 78000 psychological zone. Failing to hold above support would likely reintroduce downside pressure toward mid-range equilibrium.

Short-term trading conditions favor range strategies rather than directional conviction. Buying near support around 76735 with tight risk control below 76500 may offer favorable reward-to-risk if bullish defense continues. Conversely, breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 77400 to target extension toward 78000. Until either boundary breaks decisively, volatility compression suggests disciplined position sizing and avoidance of overleveraged entries.
